title: Origins: Quantum Fox
description: Your vision doesn't allow you to focus on more than one target. However this doesn't mean it comes with more disadvantages.
body:
For this to work, you need the Origins Mod. You can choose a different character to become your origin to experience Minecraft.

This Origin is Coded in 1.10.0 version of origin, so for other versions or forge version, there may having bugs that not expected.

# Quantum Fox

**Your vision doesn't allow you to focus on more than one target. However this doesn't mean it comes with more disadvantages.**

### Abilities
- 🔮 Target ( Primary - Toggle)
  - While Using (Primary Active) and looking at a entity within 16 blocks, you can target it. [Target] will receive 25% more damage from criticals but 25% less damage from normal hits from [Quantum Fox]. If [Quantum Fox] tries to hit someone else it will take back 8 damage. [Target] only works on nearest target within 16 blocks if there have multiples target.

- 🧿 Quantum arena ( Secondary)
  - While using (Secondary Active) and marked a [Target], you and your [Target] will both be invisible from everyone and blinded, but both of you and your [Target] will glow for each other. You can't change or reset [Target] when using Quantum Area. [Quantum Fox] will gain 25% sprinting speed, but 25% less walking speed in the duration. If there's no [Target] after you active Quantum Arena, you heal 20 health, Else, you will receive 20 damage.

### Passives
- 🌌 Target emitter ( ability passive )
  - While a [Target] is targeted it will glow and will have particles.
 
- 🍒Favorite Food
  - Berries are more saturation on you.

- 🚶‍♂️Sneaky
  - Sculk Sensor wont detect you from landing, walking and running.
